final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original macro-photography illustration of a micro-world water droplet scene, suitable as a mobile phone wallpaper (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "微观精致自然" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Levon Biss macro insect photography (ultra-detail natural world), 1990s BBC Nature documentary still-frame tradition, contemporary botanical fine-art photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be vertical close-up framing with the water droplet as the central focal point, bokeh circles filling the background
Subject: must include a single large water droplet with a reflected inverted scene inside it, surrounding grass blades, and smaller dew drops on the grass
Scene/backdrop: must include lush green grass blades and multiple dew drops as surrounding elements, background fully defocused into circular bokeh light orbs
Lighting/mood: needs a soft natural dawn-light atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh green and translucent cool-tone direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a wet glass-like surface treatment on the droplet with fine grass texture detail — exact grain and sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must be optimized for mobile wallpaper vertical format
Avoid:
